title: Loops vs Ghost (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Loops vs Ghost: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Loops and Ghost comes down to your specific use case. Loops is built for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Ghost targets writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Saas Companies Sending Product And Lifecycle Emails
comparison_table.tool_b: Writers And Creators Running Paid Newsletter Businesses

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Loops wins for SaaS companies sending product and lifecycle emails, while Ghost is stronger for writers and creators running paid newsletter businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Loops or Ghost?
faq.a: Ghost starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Ghost to Loops?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
